title: Urceola laevis

intro: Urceola laevis is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Smooth Urceola or Smooth Urceolate. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Urceola laevis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Urceola laevis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma.
